# U9 Team Session (La Masia) — 2026-04-01

**Context:** team  
**Date:** 2026-04-01  
**Total Duration:** 34 minutes  
**Notes:** Auto-generated  

---

## Equipment Needed
- ball
- bibs
- cones
- goals

---

## 1. Warm-up with Ball — 4 minutes

### Speed Dribbling in Box
*Maximum speed dribbling inside 3x3m area, changing direction every 2 seconds. PersianBall intensity.*

**Duration:** 2 min  
**Intensity:** high  
**Players:** 1+  
**Space:** minimal 3x3  
**Equipment:** ball, cones  

**Setup:**
Mark a 3x3m box with 4 cones per player.
Each player has a ball inside their own box.
Dribble at MAXIMUM speed, touch every 2 seconds must
be a sharp direction change. 20 seconds on, 10 seconds rest.
Repeat 3-4 rounds.

```
3m
○────○
|    |  Player dribbles at max speed
| ●→ |  inside this tiny box.
|  ↓ |  Sharp cuts at each cone.
○────○
3m     20s on / 10s rest
```

**Coaching Points:**
- Explosive changes of direction
- Ball always in control
- Match intensity or higher

### Ball Rolls & Touches Circuit
*Sole rolls forward/back, inside foot rolls in circle, outside foot rolls in circle — 30 seconds each foot per variation.*

**Duration:** 2 min  
**Intensity:** low  
**Players:** 1+  
**Space:** minimal 3x3  
**Equipment:** ball  

**Setup:**
Each player has a ball, standing in own 2x2m space.
Coach calls the movement, 30 seconds per variation per foot:
1) Sole roll forward/back  2) Inside foot roll in circle
3) Outside foot roll in circle  4) Sole roll side to side

```
Player stands stationary with ball:

   ←── sole roll ──→       Roll ball forward/back
       ●                   with bottom of foot
    ↙     ↘
  ●    P    ●              Then circle the ball
    ↖     ↗               with inside/outside foot
       ●
```

**Coaching Points:**
- Light pressure on ball with sole
- Both feet equal time
- Increase speed as you warm up

---

## 2. Rondo — 4 minutes

### Rondo 4v2
*Four attackers vs two defenders. Demands quicker decisions — two defenders can cover more passing lanes.*

**Duration:** 4 min  
**Intensity:** moderate  
**Players:** 6–6  
**Space:** small 10x10  
**Equipment:** ball, cones  

**Setup:**
Mark an 8x8m square with 4 cones. Four attackers on the edges
(one per side), two defenders inside the grid.
If you have 12 players, set up two grids.
Rotate defending pair every 90s or after 3 interceptions.

```
8m
○──────────○
|     A     |
|           |
D |  X    Y   | B   8m   A,B,C,D = passers (one per edge)
|           |          X,Y = defenders
|     C     |          ○ = corner cone
○──────────○           ● with A
```

**Coaching Points:**
- Move the defenders — make them shift
- Use the free man quickly
- Body shape open to see all passing options
- Defenders: work together, press as a pair

**Variations:**
- **Two-touch:** Maximum two touches
- **One-touch:** One touch only
- **Split-pass escape:** If attackers play through the two defenders = round won

---

## 3. Positional Play — 8 minutes

### Build-up from Goalkeeper (3v2)
*GK starts with ball. Three outfield players must build out against two pressers. Goal is to advance ball past halfway line through passing, not long ball.*

**Duration:** 8 min  
**Intensity:** moderate  
**Players:** 6–8  
**Space:** medium 20x20  
**Equipment:** ball, cones, bibs  

**Setup:**
Use 25x20m grid. Cone line across the middle = "halfway" target.
GK on goal line with ball. 3 build-up players (bibs) in own half.
2 pressers (no bibs) try to win ball.
Success = ball crosses halfway through passing (no long ball!).
If pressers win, they score on open goal. Reset after each attempt.
Rotate pressers every 3 attempts.

```
╔═══════════════════════╗
║         [GOAL]        ║
║           GK          ║
║                       ║
║     A1         A2     ║  A1-A3 = build-up players
║          A3           ║  D1,D2 = pressers
║ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ║  ─ ─ = halfway (target line)
║     D1      D2        ║
╚═══════════════════════╝
GK plays short → combine → cross line = success
```

**Coaching Points:**
- GK: be brave, play short
- Create triangles around the press
- Split the defenders with a pass
- If pressed hard, switch the play

---

## 4. Game Form — 8 minutes

### Counter-Attack Game (3v2)
*On turnover, 3 attackers break against 2 defenders. Creates numerical overload counter-attack situation. Rotate roles.*

**Duration:** 8 min  
**Intensity:** high  
**Players:** 5–10  
**Space:** medium 20x20  
**Equipment:** ball, cones, bibs, goals  

**Setup:**
Mark 30x20m pitch with a full-size or large goal at one end.
Coach or GK starts with ball at the goal. 3 attackers on halfway line.
2 defenders start 5m ahead of goal.
Coach plays ball to any attacker → 3v2 counter begins.
Attackers must finish within 8 seconds.
After attempt: reset. Rotate attackers/defenders every 3 reps.

```
╔═══════════════════════════╗
║  [=====GOAL=====]         ║
║      D      D             ║  D = defenders (2)
║                           ║
║                           ║
║ ─ ─ ─ ─halfway─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ║
║   A1     A2     A3       ║  A = attackers (3)
║                           ║
║        Coach ●            ║  Coach plays ball → 3v2 starts
╚═══════════════════════════╝  8 seconds to finish!
```

**Coaching Points:**
- Speed of attack — don't let defenders recover
- Wide support: stretch the 2 defenders
- Decision: when to shoot vs when to pass

---

## 5. Free Game — 8 minutes

### Direction Game with Gates
*Scattered cone gates across pitch. Score by passing through any gate to a teammate on the other side. Encourages scanning and switching play.*

**Duration:** 8 min  
**Intensity:** moderate  
**Players:** 6–16  
**Space:** medium 20x20  
**Equipment:** ball, cones, bibs  

**Setup:**
Mark 25x20m pitch. Scatter 6-8 cone gates (2 cones, 1.5m apart) randomly
across the pitch — not on the edges.
Two equal teams. Score = pass through any gate to a teammate on the other side.
Teammate must receive to count. Can't score through same gate twice in a row.
First to 5 points wins. Rotate gate positions between rounds.

```
○═══════════════════════○
|        ╫         ╫    |   ╫ = cone gate (1.5m)
|   A  B     ╫         |
|      ╫    A  B   A   |   Score = pass THROUGH a gate
|  B      ╫       B    |   to a teammate on other side.
|    A  ╫       ╫      |
|              B   A   |   6-8 gates scattered randomly.
○═══════════════════════○
```

**Coaching Points:**
- Scan for open gates — don't just look at the ball
- Switch play to find an unguarded gate
- Move to create passing lanes through gates

---

## 6. Cool Down & Reflection — 2 minutes

### Slow Sole Rolls
*Calm, controlled sole rolls — forward, backward, circular. Mindful ball contact while recovering.*

**Duration:** 2 min  
**Intensity:** low  
**Players:** 1+  
**Space:** minimal 3x3  
**Equipment:** ball  

**Setup:**
Each player stands with ball at feet. No movement needed — stationary.
Sequence (30 sec each, both feet):
1. Sole rolls forward/back (roll ball under sole gently)
2. Sole rolls side to side
3. Circular sole rolls (small circles with sole on ball)
Coach counts breathing: "Breathe in 4 counts... out 4 counts..."

```
Player stands still with ball:

    ○  ← player
   /|\
    |
  ──●──  ← ball under sole

Forward/back → Side to side → Circles
Both feet. Slow. Breathe deeply.
```

**Coaching Points:**
- No rushing — deliberate and slow
- Feel every part of the sole on the ball
- Deep breathing throughout

---
